ingredients_text: 44% cooked pilau rice (water, basmati rice, butter (milk), cumin seeds, salt, ground turmeric), 38% korma sauce (tomatoes, single cream (milk), coconut milk, water, yogurt (milk), onion, coconut cream, sugar, desiccated coconut, cornflour, dried almonds, rapeseed oil, garlic purée, ginger purée, coriander, salt, dried cumin, dried garam masala [coriander, cumin, ginger, cassia, cinnamon, ground black pepper,  cloves, dried cardamom], cashew nut purée [water, cashews], dried coriander, dried turmeric, dried cardamom, dried chilli), 18% cooked chicken breast pieces (98% chicken breast, salt),
